title: tabernaemontana inaequilateralis
intro: Tabernaemontana inaequilateralis, also known as the Puseng or Kuning telang, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and is traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Tabernaemontana inaequilateralis include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections, among others. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and tonics, which are believed to promote overall well-being and combat various ailments.
